title: El Pretérito Indefinido (Preterite): Irregular Verbs
summary: The irregular preterite stem families (tuve, hice, dije, fui...), the j-stem -eron ending quirk, the ir/ser and dar/ver overlaps, and the -ir stem-changing verbs' own third-person-only vowel shift (pidió, durmió), grouped by pattern family instead of an alphabetical list.
